title: Lava as diesel fuel
description: cheaty datapack that allows lava to be burned in create diesel generators
body:
Turn fiction (laziness) into reality by registering ``#minecraft:lava``
 as a form of combustible diesel fuel for **Create: Diesel Generators.**

_This cheaty datapack allows molten rocks to power all three types of generators as if it were a real diesel product._


Requires Create: Diesel Generators, tested in 1.20.1
